subparts.text: Water management played an important role in shaping settlement in desert region. Discuss with an example. CO 1
Explain the significance of agriculture in the history of human civilization. CO 2
Art style of Gandhara school of sculpture. CO 3

questions.question_text: The various architecture typologies of Paleolithic, and Neolithic period. CO 1
The factors influencing ritual centres during neolithic period. The different types of Neolithic era burials. CO 2
Explain the layout and the architectural features of Temple of Khons, Karnak with labelled plan and section. CO 1
Describe tomb architecture of Egypt namely the Pyramid of Giza. Draw neat sections and sketches CO 3
Write a detailed essay on the Imperial Palace of Forbidden City in China. Explain the various components of the palace complex. Illustrate your answer with suitable sketches. CO 1
How was the settlement of Mohenjadaro in Indus valley settlement planned? Explain in detail the various sections of the settlement. Draw neat plan. CO 2
Explain in detail the Buddhist Rock Cut Architecture describing the Chaityas and Viharas at Ajanta and Ellora. Draw neat sketches. CO 2
Explain the form, elements and evolution of Sanchi Stupa. Draw neat sketches. CO 3
